title: Honoring Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, Inc., on reaching the historic milestone of 105 years of scholarship, service, sisterhood, and finer womanhood.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations
crs_summary: This resolution congratulates and commends Zeta Phi Beta Sorority Inc. on 105 years of scholarship, service, sisterhood, and finer womanhood.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
